description: grāmatr hooks. SessionStart establishes the gramatr session via session_bootstrap (cwd-based project resolution + session_start; persists client_session_id↔gramatr_session_id mapping keyed by client_type in Redis with 24h TTL, configurable via BOOTSTRAP_MAPPING_TTL_SECONDS). UserPromptSubmit then rides on that mapping via route_request — the only correlation handle it needs is {client_session_id, client_type}. The architecture is client-agnostic (v0.20.18 #2756) — Claude Code is one consumer; Cursor, Codex, ChatGPT plugins drop in later by passing their own client_session_id with a matching client_type literal. SessionEnd and Stop hooks intentionally absent: classification_feedback and save_handoff require args that cannot be substituted from the client's hook event JSON, so the agent calls them itself from the per-turn directive. See #2740 for server-side adapter-tool follow-up.
